x-enumeration-literals.name: Real-time Log Method
x-enumeration-literals.description: Records log entries immediately when an event or transaction occurs.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Batch Log Method
x-enumeration-literals.description: Collects log entries and records them together at scheduled intervals.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Event-Based Log Method
x-enumeration-literals.description: Creates log entries when specific business or system events occur.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Scheduled Log Method
x-enumeration-literals.description: Records logs at predefined times or frequencies.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Synchronous Log Method
x-enumeration-literals.description: Writes log records as part of the transaction process before completion.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Asynchronous Log Method
x-enumeration-literals.description: Writes log records separately from the transaction process, often in the background.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Stream-Based Log Method
x-enumeration-literals.description: Continuously captures and processes log events as a data stream.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incremental Log Method
x-enumeration-literals.description: Records only new or changed information since the last log update.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Snapshot Log Method
x-enumeration-literals.description: Captures the complete state of data or a system at a specific point in time.

x-enumeration-literals.name: On-Demand Log Method
x-enumeration-literals.description: Generates logs when requested by a user, application, or audit process.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Exception Log Method
x-enumeration-literals.description: Records only errors, failures, or unusual events.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Audit Log Method
x-enumeration-literals.description: Records activities specifically for compliance, traceability, and auditing purposes.
